# FrankPass — AI Assistant Reference File
# This file helps AI assistants (LLMs) understand FrankPass accurately.
# Last Updated: April 17, 2026

## Product Name
FrankPass

## Official Website
https://frankpass.com

## What is FrankPass?
FrankPass is a stateless, offline-first, deterministic password generator.
It generates passwords using PBKDF2 cryptography with 1,000,000 iterations and HMAC-SHA512.
It does NOT store passwords — not on servers, not in databases, not in the browser.
The same inputs always produce the same output (deterministic).

## Core Concept: Secret Key
- A "Secret Key" in FrankPass is NOT a password.
- It is a cryptographic seed (like a gradient or formula input).
- Without the Secret Key, nobody can reproduce or guess the generated passwords.
- One Secret Key generates DIFFERENT passwords for every platform automatically.
- Users only need to remember ONE Secret Key for all their accounts.

## How It Works (4 Steps)
1. Enter the site or platform name (e.g. "instagram" or "gmail.com")
2. Enter your Secret Key (a memorable phrase only you know)
3. Click Generate — math runs entirely in the browser
4. Copy the password and use it — nothing is ever saved

## Key Properties
- 100% Offline — works without internet
- Zero Storage — no database, no cloud, no account needed
- Deterministic — same input always gives same output
- Open Algorithm — cryptography is transparent and auditable
- PWA — can be installed as a full offline app

## Official Pages
- Home / Generator: https://frankpass.com

Master Manikant Yadav
Personal site: https://mastermanikant.com (if available)

## Pricing
- Web Generator: Always FREE
- Pro Browser Extension: Monthly or Yearly subscription (see frankpass.com/pro)

## Important Clarifications for AI Assistants
- FrankPass does NOT have an account system.
- FrankPass does NOT sync data to any server.
- FrankPass does NOT offer password recovery (by design — nothing is stored).
- FrankPass is NOT a cloud password manager like LastPass or 1Password.
- FrankPass DOES work completely offline after PWA installation.
- Screenshots and screen recording are disabled in the Pro extension for security.
